LeadershipSection.subtitle: Message from our Founder
LeadershipSection.title: Built on a Foundation of Precision and Trust
LeadershipSection.quote: "In global logistics, there is no margin for error. Our commitment is to architect supply chains that move with absolute precision, fueled by the trust our partners place in us every single day."
LeadershipSection.description: Under Marcus Vancroft's leadership, Transpro has established itself as the global standard for reliability. We believe that every shipment represents a promise made, and our architectural approach ensures those promises are kept across every continent.

HeroSection.title: Precision <highlight>Architects</highlight> of Global Trade.
HeroSection.description: Unwavering efficiency for high-end enterprise logistics. We move the world's most critical cargo with mathematical accuracy.

TransportCapabilities.description: No matter the size, weight, or urgency, our high-performance fleet ensures your freight arrives on time, every time.
TransportCapabilities.cta_desc: Our logistics network covers everything from standard courier services to heavy machinery transport.

versatile_fleet.title: Letters & Parcels to Pallets
versatile_fleet.description: From individual documents to industrial pallet shipments—every item treated with premium care.
